disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.headline: This app is a demo project, not a production religious product.
disclaimer.intro: AlQuran App was built to showcase Flutter development skills, including state management, API integration, localization, audio playback, and polished mobile UI. Please treat the content and implementation here as presentation material.
disclaimer.footer_note: For real religious use, users should rely on trusted Quran sources and official products, then verify text and translations independently.

demo.title: Demo purpose only
demo.body: This repository exists to demonstrate engineering and design capability. It is not intended to represent a finished commercial or religious application.

warranty.title: No content warranty
warranty.body: The developer does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or interpretation of Quran text, translations, or audio delivered through this app.

api.title: Public API dependency
api.body: This app uses public Quran APIs and external audio sources. Availability, accuracy, and long-term stability depend on those third-party services.

education.title: Educational and portfolio use
education.body: You may study the codebase for learning purposes, but production deployment or sensitive religious use requires stronger review, validation, and operational ownership.

messages.offline: You are offline, check your internet connection
messages.no_internet: No internet connection, try again later
messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
